$comment: Committed HttpClient API-coverage baseline. Regenerate deliberately when global.json bumps the SDK. Categories: Direct (an [ApiCoverage]-tagged executable test invokes this exact API), CoveredVia (same implementation as a directly-tested overload), NotApplicable (justified).

apis.note: Thin serializer/URI-form plumbing over the same tested implementation; a representative overload of this method family is directly tested. Nothing below HttpClient differs between overloads.
